LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANTS MAHMOOD MUNSHI AND CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED BASED ON RES JUDICATA AND FAILURE TO FILE SUIT WITHIN SIX MONTHS OF NOTICE OF DENIAL OF PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 945.6(1). PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER. JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: CHRISTINA PAXTON, CSR # 1558

LAW AND MOTION, 301, PLAINTIFF HABIB HEMANI'S MOTION TO OPPOSE DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER IN ITS ENTIRETY AS FILED ON MAY 4, 2007 IS DENIED FOR REASONS STATED WITH RESPECT TO DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER. JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: CHRISTINA PAXTON, CSR #1558
